topic: Interaction of forces (Frictional force, gravitational force, elastic spring force)

buckets.description: Questions involving experiments to determine how factors like surface texture, mass, or lubricants affect the amount of friction or an object's motion.

Questions requiring students to apply their understanding of force properties to explain phenomena, predict outcomes, or analyze energy changes.
